name: @sweny-ai/action
description: Autonomous SRE triage GitHub Action — monitors logs, creates issues, opens fix PRs

scripts.package: ncc build src/main.ts -o ../../dist --source-map --license licenses.txt && cp ../../node_modules/@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk/cli.js ../../dist/cli.js && cp ../core/src/workflows/*.yml ../../dist/
scripts.all: npm run build && npm run package
